description: A citizen needs to pay a fine for a traffic violation online.

nodes.task_description: Identify the fine using the citation number or the citizen's name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully locates the outstanding fine in the court system.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the amount of the fine.

expected_outcome.value: Agent states the correct amount due.

nodes.task_description: Process the payment via credit card.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully takes payment and marks the fine as paid.
